name: testbench
description: Testbench development: stimulus → assertions → simulation loop

tasks.content: Review DUT interface and identify all test scenarios
tasks.detail: Read the DUT source. List: corner cases, reset behavior, overflow conditions, protocol edge cases. Each scenario becomes a test vector.

tasks.content: Write testbench with all test scenarios
tasks.detail: tb_<module>.sv: instantiate DUT, generate clk, apply reset, implement all test vectors from task 1. Print PASS/FAIL per test. Sum totals at end.
Run: bash scripts/sim.sh tb_<module>.sv. All tests must PASS. Fix DUT or testbench as needed.
Check that all branches in the DUT are exercised. Add test vectors for uncovered branches if needed.
